'''wanopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherboard|featherboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherboard|featherboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wanopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wænepeth|wænepeth]] || [[word:wænepej|wænepej]] || [[word:wænepesh|wænepesh]] || [[word:wænepe|wænepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanonopoth|wanonopoth]] || [[word:wanonopoj|wanonopoj]] || [[word:wanonoposh|wanonoposh]] || [[word:wanonopo|wanonopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanopoth|wanopoth]] || [[word:wanopoj|wanopoj]] || [[word:wanoposh|wanoposh]] || [[word:wanopo|wanopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanofpoth|wanofpoth]] || [[word:wanofpoj|wanofpoj]] || [[word:wanofposh|wanofposh]] || [[word:wanofpof|wanofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanopotho|wanopotho]] || [[word:wanopojo|wanopojo]] || [[word:wanoposho|wanoposho]] || [[word:wanopoko|wanopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanopoth|wanopoth]] || [[word:wanopoj|wanopoj]] || [[word:wanoposh|wanoposh]] || [[word:wanopo|wanopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanopothol|wanopothol]] || [[word:wanopojol|wanopojol]] || [[word:wanoposhol|wanoposhol]] || [[word:wanopokol|wanopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanopothotho|wanopothotho]] || [[word:wanopojojo|wanopojojo]] || [[word:wanoposhosho|wanoposhosho]] || [[word:wanopoko|wanopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanopothon|wanopothon]] || [[word:wanopojon|wanopojon]] || [[word:wanoposhon|wanoposhon]] || [[word:wanopokon|wanopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanopothoro|wanopothoro]] || [[word:wanopojoro|wanopojoro]] || [[word:wanoposhoro|wanoposhoro]] || [[word:wanopokoro|wanopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
